meaning: n.拒绝作证(黑手党徒的一种行为准则)
examples: Even a Sicilian sentenced to twenty years might break the omerta and talk his brains out.
In practice, this works about as well as the tradition of omerta in organized crime.
It is hard to determine just how she does this, since her senior colleagues know they would soon fall from favour if they broke the omerta that surrounds her.
